positions.title: Software Development Engineer
highlights: Designed and developed RESTful APIs for the full vehicle order lifecycle, reducing order processing time by approximately 40%.
Built dynamic filtering and search for complex multi-condition fleet queries, reducing admin query resolution time by over 30%.
Developed React order-management dashboards with role-aware rendering and consistent loading, error, and empty-state handling.
Implemented OAuth2 + ADFS enterprise SSO across 6+ microservices with fine-grained RBAC and JWT-based session handling.
Migrated a legacy SOAP recall integration to REST with mutual TLS and feature-flag rollback, reducing latency by approximately 35%.
Built a WireMock-based mock server for 4 external dependencies, reducing CI failures by approximately 80%.
Hardened platform security with Keycloak JWT auth, stricter CORS rules, and locked actuator endpoints, closing critical security gaps.
Delivered an end-to-end Excel import/export flow with row-level validation and atomic rollback, reducing onboarding time by approximately 60%.
